overall.description: A third-person horror game scene featuring a character in a long dark coat exploring a dimly lit, foggy bedroom with worn wooden floors and atmospheric candlelight. The character slowly walks around the room examining a body on the ground before approaching a red door with warning graffiti painted on it.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit bedroom with metal bed frame and corpse

agents.ego_description: walking slowly toward the window area to examine the body lying on the wooden floor

entered.detail: metal frame bed with white mattress and sheets
body lying face down on the wooden floor in tattered clothing
worn and damaged wooden planks covering the room
lit candles on nightstand providing warm flickering light
large windows with multiple panes letting in dim exterior light

segments.scene_description: The character begins exploring a foggy, candlelit bedroom, walking past a metal bed frame toward a corpse lying near the windows. The room has damaged wooden floors and a tense, atmospheric horror aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: center of room transitioning from window area

events.description: character turns away from the windows and begins walking back across the room

agents.ego_description: turning away from the body and walking back toward the center of the room, passing wooden furniture

entered.detail: old wooden desk or dresser against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the window area and walks back across the room, causing the metal bed to shift from the right to the left of the frame while leaving the windows behind. The corpse becomes visible in the background as the character moves toward the room's center.

scene_state.functional_zone: doorway with red painted warning door

events.description: character shifts focus from room exploration to approaching the exit door

agents.ego_description: walking directly toward the red door with white graffiti, preparing to interact with the exit

entered.detail: red painted wooden door with white graffiti text reading KEEP OUT

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a red door with white warning graffiti, moving from the center of the room toward the exit. The metal bed frame recedes into the left background while the door grows larger in the frame, dominating the view as the segment ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit, foggy bedroom that shifts from an investigation of a grim discovery to an approach toward a mysterious exit. It begins with the character walking past a metal bed frame toward a corpse lying near the windows on damaged wooden floors. As the character turns away from the window area, the camera tracks backward across the room, causing the bed to shift from the right to the left of the frame while the body recedes into the background. The scene then opens up as the character moves from the center of the room toward a red door marked with white warning graffiti. Finally, the metal bed frame disappears into the left background as the door grows larger in the frame, dominating the view.
